chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Revision Application No.101 of 2024 (Ijaz Atif vs. The State & others) 25.11.2024 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Rashid, advocate for applicant Mr. Mehmood Ali, advocate for respondent No.2 Mr. Gul Faraz Khattak, Assistant Attorney General O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- In this revision application, an order passed by learned Intellectual Property Tribunal (Sindh & Balochistan) at Karachi, on charge sheet u/s 173 CrPC in Crime No.20/2021, u/s 56, 66, 66-A Copyright Ordinance, 1962, has been impugned. The applicant is complainant and the order passed by learned Tribunal on the Challan is “accepted”. In this Challan, as per version of applicant/complainant the main accused, namely, Yasir Mehmood has been let off by the police without any rhyme and reason although there was sufficient material against him. 2. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicant has accepted the proposal that since at the time of accepting the Challan, he was not heard, nor it was a requirement of law, he may be allowed to move an application before the Tribunal along with material allegedly collected by the IO in the investigation against main accused for a fresh consideration by the Tribunal, and taking cognizance of offence against him. 3. This proposal has not been opposed by the other side counsel either. 4. In view of above, this criminal revision application is disposed of. Let applicant file a fresh application before the tribunal and highlight the material/incriminating evidence, if any, against the main accused which the tribunal shall consider in accordance with law and decide the application first before proceeding with the trial on merits.

In view of above, this criminal revision application is disposed of. Let applicant file a fresh application before the tribunal and highlight the material/incriminating evidence, if any, against the main accused which the tribunal shall consider in accordance with law and decide the application first before proceeding with the trial on merits. This criminal revision application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
